items.title: PM stands by decision not to join strikes on Iran and sends more jets to Qatar
items.snippet: The PM said the best way forward was a "negotiated settlement with Iran where they give up their nuclear ambitions".

items.title: Starmer tries to reassure as Iran crisis deepens
items.snippet: The PM acknowledged people are worried about family abroad, the economy, and potential further escalation.

items.title: Iran school and nearby military base struck multiple times, satellite image reveals
items.snippet: Iranian authorities say the attack, which took place on Saturday, killed 168 people.

items.title: How depleted weapons stockpiles could affect the Iran conflict
items.snippet: Weapons stocks will not alone decide the outcome of this conflict, but it's certainly a significant factor, writes the BBC's Jonathan Beale.

items.title: Iran targets headquarters of Iranian Kurdish forces in Iraq
items.snippet: The Iranian military's strikes come amid speculation that the US wants Iranian Kurdish groups to join its conflict with Iran.

items.title: Failed asylum seeker families to be offered up to £40k to leave UK
items.snippet: The home secretary says the "incentives" will deliver a "significant saving to the taxpayer".
